new_findings.finding: S9 persistent R across B55 and B56 with identical failure pattern: turn 1 LLM calls describe_action(skill__skill_builder) then replies inline asking for skill name; turn 2 user provides name but LLM again asks inline (full set of skill_builder params) without routing. routing_decided and skill_run_spawned never emit. The describe_action result shows LLM is aware of skill_builder but defaults to collecting all params inline rather than invoking. N=2 batches same symptom — hypothesis: router needs explicit instruction to route after param-gathering, not just gather params.

S7 stable I across B55 and B56: rag.operation__recall called correctly (hint working), but tool returns missing_required_arg for 'sources' and LLM asks user to list sources rather than reporting no indexed sources found. Env limitation: no indexed sources indexed for agent at runtime. Consistent with B55 I verdict. No regression.
